data.title: MoonPay Buys Stablecoin Infrastructure Platform Iron in Latest M&A Deal, No Price Given
data.description:
• MoonPay has bought API-focused stablecoin infrastructure platform Iron.
  • Financials of the transaction were not disclosed, but a report said the deal was worth at least $100 million.

data.title: Gold Jumps to New Record, for Now Winning Debate Against Bitcoin as Risk-Off Asset
data.description:
• Stocks are headed lower again on Thursday, pulling bitcoin down alongside.
  • Gold continued to shine during this big risk asset drawdown, rising to a new record and within a few dollars of hitting $3,000 per ounce for the first time.
  • Gold ETFs are enjoying their largest inflows since 2022, while spot BTC ETFs have bled $5 billion since February, highlighting where capital is flowing during the current market correction.

data.title: Circle Plans to Bring $1B Tokenized Treasury Issuer Hashnote Under Bermuda License
data.description:
• USDC stablecoin issuer Circle plans to bring its recently acquired Hashnote Tokenized Money Market Fund under Bermuda’s regulatory oversight, incorporating it into its existing Digital Assets Business Act license.
  • Hashnote issues USYC, the largest tokenized money market fund with nearly $1 billion in assets.
  • Circle CEO Jeremy Allaire sees Bermuda as a "natural choice" for USYC operations, given its role in digital asset regulation.

data.title: Bitcoin Miner IREN Upgraded to Overweight, Cipher Mining Cut to Neutral: JPMorgan
data.description:
• JPMorgan cut price targets for bitcoin miners in its coverage by 19%-29%.
  • The bank upgraded IREN to overweight from neutral and cut Cipher Mining to neutral from overweight.
  • It reiterated its overweight rating on Riot Platforms and CleanSpark, and its neutral recommendation on MARA Holdings.

data.title: Solana Proposal, Which Could Cut SOL Inflation By 80%, Gains Limited Validator Support
data.description:
• The Solana proposal, SIMD-0228, which aims to drastically reduce SOL's inflation rate, has seen only 55% of validators vote, of which only 37.8% voted in favor.
  • The proposal advocates for a market-based token emission mechanism, which could positively impact Solana-based decentralized finance and boost liquid onchain SOL markets.
  • If approved, the proposal could reduce SOL's inflation rate from 4.5% to around 0.87%, potentially boosting its value, but it could also force smaller validators out, raising concerns about network decentralization.

data.title: Crypto Trading Volumes Dropped 20% in February as Tariffs Threats Fazed Investors
data.description:
• Centralized exchange trading volumes fell 21% last month to $7.2 trillion.
  • CME’s trading volumes declined for the first time in five months, though its market share hit an all-time high.
  • Open interest on centralized exchanges dropped to the lowest level since November.

data.title: Solv Raises $10M for Bitcoin Reserve Offering to Drive Institutional BTC Finance Adoption
data.description:
• Solv has raised $10 million for its Bitcoin Reserve Offering (BRO) as it aims to build a $100 million BTC reserve.
  • Solv will deploy the BTC raised to various yield-generating vehicles, such as liquid staking tokens.
  • BRO may appeal to institutions who wish to invest in BTC as a store of value in a similar way to Strategy (as MicroStrategy is now called) but without physically purchasing and holding it themselves.

data.title: Why Strategy's Preferred Stock, STRK, Is Defying MSTR's Downturn
data.description:
• Strategy's preferred stock, STRK, offers a dividend yield of 9% at its current price and has lower volatility than either MSTR or bitcoin.
  • STRK includes a 10-to-1 conversion option if MSTR stock rises to $1,000.
  • The large $21 billion ATM issuance could affect STRK’s upside potential, similar to its effect on MSTR’s common stock.

data.title: Ripple Bags Dubai License to Offer Crypto Payments in UAE
data.description:
• Ripple has received approval from the Dubai Financial Services Authority to provide regulated crypto payments and services in the UAE, making it the first blockchain-enabled payments provider licensed by the agency.
  • Ripple has seen increasing demand in the Middle East, with around 20% of its global customer base operating in the region.
  • Ripple's DFSA license adds to its over 60 regulatory approvals worldwide, including licenses from the Monetary Authority of Singapore, New York Department of Financial Services, Central Bank of Ireland, and multiple U.S. states.

data.title: XRP Short Bias Lingers Amid Ripple Legal Hopes, DOGE Nears Death Cross as BTC Dominance Hits 4-Year high
data.description:
• XRP's funding rates and cumulative volume delta indicate a lingering bias for shorts despite the price bounce. Several other tokens see similar dynamic.
  • DOGE is heading into the ominous-sounding death cross, which has a mixed record of predicting trends in the BTC and ETH markets.
  • Traders continue to rotate money out of altcoins and into bitcoin.
